'''hothayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:phacolithic|phacolithic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phacolithic|phacolithic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hothayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothayithi|hothayithi]] || [[word:hothayiji|hothayiji]] || [[word:hothayishi|hothayishi]] || [[word:hothayiki|hothayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothayuthuthu|hothayuthuthu]] || [[word:hothayujuju|hothayujuju]] || [[word:hothayushushu|hothayushushu]] || [[word:hothayukuku|hothayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothayuthu|hothayuthu]] || [[word:hothayuju|hothayuju]] || [[word:hothayushu|hothayushu]] || [[word:hothayuku|hothayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothayufthuf|hothayufthuf]] || [[word:hothayufjuf|hothayufjuf]] || [[word:hothayufshuf|hothayufshuf]] || [[word:hothayufkuf|hothayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothayethe|hothayethe]] || [[word:hothayeje|hothayeje]] || [[word:hothayeshe|hothayeshe]] || [[word:hothayeke|hothayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothayothotho|hothayothotho]] || [[word:hothayojojo|hothayojojo]] || [[word:hothayoshosho|hothayoshosho]] || [[word:hothayokoko|hothayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothayotho|hothayotho]] || [[word:hothayojo|hothayojo]] || [[word:hothayosho|hothayosho]] || [[word:hothayoko|hothayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothayofthof|hothayofthof]] || [[word:hothayofjof|hothayofjof]] || [[word:hothayofshof|hothayofshof]] || [[word:hothayofkof|hothayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothayïfthïf|hothayïfthïf]] || [[word:hothayïfjïf|hothayïfjïf]] || [[word:hothayïfshïf|hothayïfshïf]] || [[word:hothayïfkïf|hothayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothayïfthïfthïf|hothayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hothayïfjïfjïf|hothayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hothayïfshïfshïf|hothayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hothayïfkïfkïf|hothayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothayïfthïf|hothayïfthïf]] || [[word:hothayïfjïf|hothayïfjïf]] || [[word:hothayïfshïf|hothayïfshïf]] || [[word:hothayïfkïf|hothayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothayïfthïf|hothayïfthïf]] || [[word:hothayïfjïf|hothayïfjïf]] || [[word:hothayïfshïf|hothayïfshïf]] || [[word:hothayïfkïf|hothayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothayæthæ|hothayæthæ]] || [[word:hothayæjæ|hothayæjæ]] || [[word:hothayæshæ|hothayæshæ]] || [[word:hothayækæ|hothayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothayathatha|hothayathatha]] || [[word:hothayajaja|hothayajaja]] || [[word:hothayashasha|hothayashasha]] || [[word:hothayakaka|hothayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothayatha|hothayatha]] || [[word:hothayaja|hothayaja]] || [[word:hothayasha|hothayasha]] || [[word:hothayaka|hothayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothayafthaf|hothayafthaf]] || [[word:hothayafjaf|hothayafjaf]] || [[word:hothayafshaf|hothayafshaf]] || [[word:hothayafkaf|hothayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hothayasha|hothayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothayshësha|hothayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothayrosha|hothayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothaymusha|hothaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothayasha|hothayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothaynkshësha|gohothaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothaynkrosha|gohothaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothaynkmusha|gohothaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothaynkyasha|gohothaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hothathayasha|hothathayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothathayshësha|hothathayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothathayrosha|hothathayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothathaymusha|hothathaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothathayasha|hothathayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothathaynkshësha|gohothathaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothathaynkrosha|gohothathaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothathaynkmusha|gohothathaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothathaynkyasha|gohothathaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hethæyasha|hethæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hethæyshësha|hethæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hethæyrosha|hethæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hethæymusha|hethæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hethæyasha|hethæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohethæynkshësha|gohethæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohethæynkrosha|gohethæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohethæynkmusha|gohethæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohethæynkyasha|gohethæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hothfayasha|hothfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothfayshësha|hothfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothfayrosha|hothfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothfaymusha|hothfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothfayasha|hothfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothfaynkshësha|gohothfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothfaynkrosha|gohothfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothfaynkmusha|gohothfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothfaynkyasha|gohothfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
